reviews.review_description: Game is super fun, the only thing I wish it had was a seated mode and a tinnitus audio setting the beeping makes me crazy so I have to play with the volume off half the time lol but this game is seriously awesome would love more levels and if they make a third one I'm definitely buying it. [ EDIT ] THEY fixed everything i said in the above. Changed rating to 5 stars.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for sticking with us and for updating your review! 🙌

We really appreciate you sharing honest feedback — comments like yours directly help shape the game. We're glad the seated mode and audio changes made the experience better for you!

And don’t worry — more levels and content are already on the way 👀🧟‍♂️

Thanks again for the support and for being part of the community ❤️

reviews.review_description:
I was impressed that you guys added talking NPCs to the game. That's good to see in any game.

I know the games about drinking and shooting but I don't like that you have to drink constantly it just pulls me out of the action.

I bought it for £2 so can't complain too much but seems ok

Edit: nah I give up. The game is way too difficult with that drinking mechanic. Even on low difficulty.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the honest feedback — we really appreciate you taking the time to update your review.

We’re glad you noticed the talking NPCs — adding more life and interaction to the world is something we care a lot about.

Regarding the drinking mechanic and difficulty: we hear you. Balancing the gameplay so it stays fun without breaking the action flow is something we’re actively working on. Player feedback like yours is helping us adjust pacing and comfort options in future updates.

Thanks again for giving the game a try and sharing your experience — it genuinely helps us improve.

reviews.review_description:
Purchased the game immediately as I want to try and support the devs in Early Access as I enjoyed the game on PC VR which is also in Early Access. To my surprise the Quest version has full locomotion and click turning when the PC VR version was a stationary wave shooter with no analog stick turning at all (have not checked to see if it has been updated yet). I wished for stick turning, didn't expect full loco, it makes the game much more enjoyable for me playing in a smaller play space, I can easily grab booze and ammo from wherever it is without any problems now.

Wave shooters started to bore me many years ago but with this game I found it entertaining and fun to play as it has a story and the game does not stay in one location for too long, there are in game engine cutscenes to experience and set pieces to enjoy like early on driving a combine harvester through a field of zombies, Farming Simulator VR this is not.

The Quest version has downgraded visuals from the PC VR version of course but everything seems to be there from what I have played so far. The in game engine cutscenes still have great scale, seeing an 18 wheeler crash off a flyover or zombie birds picking up ragdoll corpse is all present to enjoy. They have added powerup special drink shots to the Quest version that can be very fun to use like drinks that make environments gravity free, drinks that make the whole environments change in front of your eyes, all sorts of things which is a welcome and fun addition.

My hope is the devs will be able add all the content on the in game noticeboard roadmap, update the PC VR version and then get the PSVR2 version out that was spoke about on PSVR subreddit some time ago. I think many more people will
enjoy the game now it has full loco, I would think about adding smooth turn option with turn speed slider. Great to see the game on Quest as I thought the entertaining arcade zombie wave shooter story game with its own style and humour was in development hell.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the incredibly thoughtful and detailed review — this really means a lot to us 🙏
We truly appreciate your support in Early Access and your experience with both the PC VR and Quest versions of the game.

We’re very happy to hear that full locomotion and stick turning on Quest made the experience more enjoyable for you, especially in a smaller play space. Improving comfort, accessibility, and overall fun was a big goal for us on Quest, so it’s great to know that this direction worked for you.

It’s also awesome to hear that the story, pacing, cutscenes, and set pieces helped keep the experience fresh and engaging — and yes, definitely not Farming Simulator VR 😄
Despite the visual downgrade compared to PC VR, we worked hard to preserve the scale, moments, and gameplay systems, so we’re glad those elements still shine through.

Thanks as well for calling out the special drink power-ups — those were added specifically to push the madness and variety further, and we’re excited to expand on that system.

Your feedback and hopes regarding the roadmap, PC VR updates, and future platforms are heard. Early Access exists because of players like you, and input like this helps shape where the game goes next.
Also, the suggestion for a smooth turning option with adjustable turn speed is noted 👍

Thanks again for believing in the project and for sticking with us. We’re far from done — more updates are coming 🍻🧟‍♂️

reviews.review_description:
This game is getting better and better. They have already added smooth turning, and I swear it's looking more sharp. I can't wait for more story content. So far, what you have is pretty varied and interesting. If they manage to keep the story going, it's going to be an awesome game. Keep up the fantastic work! 🙌 Genuinely can't wait to see where they take this game.

Ps. now you have added seated you might need to add an adjust hight for seated players

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the updated review — it really means a lot to us! 🙌🍻

We’re super happy to hear that smooth turning and seated mode made the experience better for you, and yes — we’ve been working on visual improvements too, so glad you noticed!

More story content is definitely coming, and we’re actively expanding the world and missions step by step.

Also, great point about height adjustment for seated players — that’s very helpful feedback and something we’ll look into as we continue improving accessibility and comfort options.

Thanks again for the support and for sticking with the game as it grows. More chaos (and zombies) on the way! 🧟‍♂️🔥

reviews.review_description:
I know it’s early access but here is what I don’t like about the game;

1) No seated mode - I’m 60.

2) No smooth turning 

But I’ll keep it to support the developers !

P.S. Remind me of Left for dead!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the feedback and for supporting us! 🙌
We’ve already started looking into these options. Enjoy the game! 🍻🧟‍♂️

reviews.review_description:
I know its early access but lacking in content as of release
With a few bugs and jank
But for the price it is fun and if the devs complete the roadmap and clean out the bugs this could be a good shooter

Won't refund to support the devs and hope for updates
I will add stars to my review when they do

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the honest feedback and for supporting us during Early Access — it really means a lot.

We’ve just released our first post-launch update, and it’s only the beginning. We’re actively working on more content, bug fixes, and improvements as we continue moving through the roadmap.

Thanks for giving us the time to grow and improve — more updates are coming soon 🙌🍻

reviews.review_description:
What other VR game has you running away from zombies AND a tornado at the same time? You'll need to juggle your beer and your blasting if you want to survive, but you're sure to enjoy it! Video gameplay here:

https://youtu.be/uJGnt3ArMn4?si=H-XgSeZLfaFjdIgN

Brought it yesterday just beat it today need more chapters need more love the game it's fun engaging Love the storyline keep up the good work we need more more when's the next update can't wait to finish the story

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for such a detailed and energetic review! 🔥
We’re incredibly happy that Drunk Or Dead 2 really clicked with you — beating it in one sitting and then jumping straight into Hard mode is impressive 💪

Huge thanks for the feedback:

More chapters and maps — we hear you loud and clear. New content is coming and the game will continue to grow.

More action and variety — your suggestions are noted 👀

The bug with the mannequin room and falling through the map — thank you for pointing that out. We’ve passed this to the team and it will be fixed in an upcoming patch.

It means a lot to us that you not only enjoyed the game but also took the time to help us improve it.
Stay tuned for updates — there’s more madness on the way 🍻🧟‍♂️

Thanks again for the support! ❤️

reviews.review_description: I just tried my first mission and I have to say that I loved it. One of my new favorite games probably Awesome work

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! 🙌
We’re really happy to hear that you enjoyed your first mission and that the game made such a strong first impression. Knowing it could become one of your favorites truly means a lot to us.

Thanks for the support — more content and updates are coming! 🍻🧟‍♂️

reviews.review_description: So good i need Survival wave mode!

developer_response.body:
Thanks! 🧟‍♂️🔥
A Horde / Survival mode is actually something we see players asking for more and more — and we’re definitely listening 👀

The more survivors join the game, the more content we can build and expand. Keep the ideas coming! 🍻

reviews.review_description: It is not Finnished yet but is worth the money😉

developer_response.body:
Appreciate it! 🍻🧟‍♂️
Yep, we’re still cooking — but we’re glad you’re already having fun with it 😉
More updates and madness are on the way!

reviews.review_description: This is better than the cost of admission..guns feel great and its real good fun...underpriced gem

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much — we’re really happy to read feedback like this! 🙌
With more support and visibility, we’ll be able to make even more content and keep improving the game even further.

Thanks for being part of the journey! 🍻🧟‍♂️

reviews.review_description: Ok so are the graphics going to win award's....no. but, is this fun and worth your time? Absolutely! Definitely not for kids, and definitely a silly fun time, recommended!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the awesome review! 🍻🧟‍♂️
We’re really happy you’re having fun with the game — that chaotic, silly zombie energy is exactly what we were going for 😄

More content and improvements are already on the way, so stay tuned… things are only going to get crazier from here!

Thanks again for playing and for the recommendation — it really helps us a lot! 🙌

— The Drunk Or Dead 2 Team

reviews.review_description: It’s no award winning game but the quality is very good for 2.99 it’s a new approach to a zombie game and it’s done quite well

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot! 🍻
We're really glad you enjoyed it. The more players join the chaos, the more content we can keep adding to the game. 🧟‍♂️
Appreciate the support!
